languages.text: "Меровцев не назовешь образцом добродетели. Себериану пришлось отдельно распорядиться, чтобы павшим {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестрам Битвы{/g} воздавали должные почести и предавали их земле как подобает. Но с другими телами меровцы могли обойтись без особых церемоний".

traits.locale_text: "Меровцев не назовешь образцом добродетели. Себериану пришлось отдельно распорядиться, чтобы павшим {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестрам Битвы{/g} воздавали должные почести и предавали их земле как подобает. Но с другими телами меровцы могли обойтись без особых церемоний".

languages.text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."
languages.original_text: "Меровцев не назовешь образцом добродетели. Себериану пришлось отдельно распорядиться, чтобы павшим {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Сестрам Битвы{/g} воздавали должные почести и предавали их земле как подобает. Но с другими телами меровцы могли обойтись без особых церемоний".

traits.locale_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

"The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

"The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

languages.text: “梅罗夫那帮人可不是什么道德楷模。塞贝里安不得不专门下令，要求厚葬那些阵亡的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}，为她们举行体面的葬礼。至于其他阵亡者，梅罗夫人倒是有权省去那些特殊的仪式。”
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: “梅罗夫那帮人可不是什么道德楷模。塞贝里安不得不专门下令，要求厚葬那些阵亡的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}战斗修女{/g}，为她们举行体面的葬礼。至于其他阵亡者，梅罗夫人倒是有权省去那些特殊的仪式。”

languages.text: « Les Meroviens ne sont certes pas des modèles de sainteté. Seberian a dû leur ordonner expressément de rendre hommage aux {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g} en organisant des funérailles dignes de ce nom. Mais pour toutes les autres victimes, ils étaient autorisés à passer outre le protocole habituel. »
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: « Les Meroviens ne sont certes pas des modèles de sainteté. Seberian a dû leur ordonner expressément de rendre hommage aux {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sœurs de Bataille{/g} en organisant des funérailles dignes de ce nom. Mais pour toutes les autres victimes, ils étaient autorisés à passer outre le protocole habituel. »

languages.text: "Merovluların erdem timsali olduğu söylenemez. Seberian, hayatını kaybetmiş {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'nin{/g} onurlandırılmasına binaen uygun bir cenaze töreni düzenlenmesini özellikle emretmek zorunda kalmıştı. Ancak söz konusu diğer ölmüşler olduğunda Merovluların özel törenleri es geçmesine müsaade edilmişti."
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: "Merovluların erdem timsali olduğu söylenemez. Seberian, hayatını kaybetmiş {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Harp Rahibeleri'nin{/g} onurlandırılmasına binaen uygun bir cenaze töreni düzenlenmesini özellikle emretmek zorunda kalmıştı. Ancak söz konusu diğer ölmüşler olduğunda Merovluların özel törenleri es geçmesine müsaade edilmişti."

languages.text: «Los merovianos no son ejemplos de virtud. Seberian tuvo que ordenar específicamente que las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g} caídas se honraran y enterraran con los rituales debidos, pero los merovianos tienen permiso para deshacerse de cualquier otro caído sin ninguna ceremonia».
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: «Los merovianos no son ejemplos de virtud. Seberian tuvo que ordenar específicamente que las {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Hermanas de Batalla{/g} caídas se honraran y enterraran con los rituales debidos, pero los merovianos tienen permiso para deshacerse de cualquier otro caído sin ninguna ceremonia».

languages.text: "Die Merovianer sind kein Ausbund an Tugend. Seberian musste ausdrücklich anordnen, dass die gefallenen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g} geehrt und anständig begraben werden. Aber an allen anderen Gefangenen durften die Merovianer spezielle Zeremonien durchführen."
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: "Die Merovianer sind kein Ausbund an Tugend. Seberian musste ausdrücklich anordnen, dass die gefallenen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sororitas{/g} geehrt und anständig begraben werden. Aber an allen anderen Gefangenen durften die Merovianer spezielle Zeremonien durchführen."

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンは徳のモデルではない。シベリアは、転落した{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}戦乙女{/g}が敬意を払い、適切な埋葬を受けると特命した。しかし、それ以外の転落した者については、メロヴィアンは特別な儀式を省略することが許されていた。」
languages.original_text: "The Merovians are no models of virtue. Seberian had to specifically order that the fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}Sisters of Battle{/g} be honoured and given a fitting burial. But for any other fallen, the Merovians were permitted to do away with special ceremonies."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィアンは徳のモデルではない。シベリアは、転落した{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitasGlossary}戦乙女{/g}が敬意を払い、適切な埋葬を受けると特命した。しかし、それ以外の転落した者については、メロヴィアンは特別な儀式を省略することが許されていた。」
